title: SPA Yield Lab — Strategy Candidate Record
description: A discovered yield opportunity, recorded at the front of the discovery funnel (docs/35 §2, DISCOVERY-002). Research artifact only: explicitly NOT a Strategy Card and NOT an approval; never read by the deterministic RiskPolicy or execution path. A high apparent_yield is a reason to investigate, never to allocate. All concrete APY/TVL/capacity/liquidity numbers are unverified until sourced with an evidence level (docs/37). Promotion to a Strategy Card requires the full docs/35 §3 hard gate ending in human approval.

candidate_id.description: Stable unique id for the candidate, e.g. CAND-0001. Never reused.

source.description: Which discovery signal surface (docs/35 §1) surfaced this candidate, e.g. defillama_yields, funding_rates, pendle_markets, rwa_yields, governance, new_launches.

strategy_type.description: Category from docs/33 / docs/38, e.g. curated-vault, fixed-carry, basis, funding, lp, lending, rwa, restaking, leverage.

assets.description: Concrete assets involved (stablecoin(s) / BTC / ETH), e.g. ['USDC','sUSDe'].

protocols.description: Protocol(s) touched; each requires a Protocol Card (docs/12) before promotion.

apparent_yield.description: Raw observed feed value labelled unverified, or a category string for public reference. Not a verified APY; requires verification (docs/37). null when unknown.

suspected_yield_source.description: Which of the five yield buckets (docs/33 §0) the yield is suspected to come from: borrow demand, tail-risk compensation, basis/funding, incentives/subsidy, or real economic cashflow.

required_due_diligence.description: Specific reviews still owed before promotion (docs/35 §3 gate).

first_risk_flags.description: Immediate concerns from first look, e.g. leverage, opacity, depeg-history, incentive-dependence, thin-depth, new-launch, off-code-counterparty.

capacity_guess.description: Rough deployable size plus the binding constraint, expressed as a method not an invented number (docs/35 §2). Requires verification.

liquidity_guess.description: Rough exit liquidity and expected slippage at the intended tier, expressed as a method (docs/35 §2). Requires verification.

initial_product_line_fit.description: Tentative product-line fit (docs/34 ranges). Provisional; the real line is decided at approval.

initial_capital_tier_fit.description: Smallest capital tier where it plausibly works (docs/34 tier ladder). Tentative.

required_data_sources.description: Feeds needed to verify the yield; must be reproducible by our own code (a yield our code cannot pull cannot pass step-1 verification, docs/35 §3).

next_action.description: One concrete next step, e.g. verify feed / write protocol card / red-team / reject / draft paper-test plan.
